cards.name: 2 of Cups
cards.interpretation: unity, partnership, attraction, connection, close bonds, joining forces, mutual respect

cards.name: 2 of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: balancing resources, adaptation, resourcefulness, flexibility, stretching resources

cards.name: 9 of Pentacles, reversed
cards.interpretation: being guarded, living beyond means, material instability, reckless spending, superficiality
